pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor the Maven groupId to reflect the new package namespace.
Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
Add Selenium Java dependency for end-to-end UI testing.
Add WebDriverManager dependency to handle browser driver management.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to set system properties for test result directory.

README.md.general_idea: Update the README documentation to reflect the new package namespace after refactoring.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'java/com/caveanimal/stinger/' to 'java/com/codecounter/stinger/' in the directory tree diagram.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update the logging level configuration to match the new package name after refactoring.

src/main/resources/static/css/style.css.general_idea: Add CSS styles for a new live analysis log component to display file analysis events.
src/main/resources/static/css/style.css.human_impl: .analysis-live { margin-top: 12px; } .analysis-log { list-style: none; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #e6e6e6; ... }

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Implement back/forward navigation stack to allow users to traverse directory history.
Centralize path navigation into a single `goToPath` function to manage state and history consistently.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: Created `goToPath(path, pushHistory)` and updated `navigateBtn`, `keypress`, and `navigateToDirectory` to use it.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Replace synchronous directory analysis with Server-Sent Events (SSE) for real-time progress updates.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: Replaced `analyzeDirectory` call with `analyzeDirectoryStream` using `EventSource` to listen for `start`, `directory`, `file`, and `result` events.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Replace inline `onclick` attributes with programmatic event listeners for better security and maintainability.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: Removed `onclick` from HTML generation in `displayFiles` and added `addEventListener` calls for `.file-item` and `#parentDirItem`.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Correctly handle navigation to the root of a Windows drive (e.g., C:\) when moving up from a drive letter.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: Added check in `navigateToParent` for single-part paths matching drive letters to return `C:\` instead of empty string.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Ensure analysis results display correctly even if specific fields are missing or null.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.human_impl: Used nullish coalescing `?? 0` in `displayAnalysisResults` for all numeric fields like `totalFolders` and `totalFiles`.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Add a UI button to allow users to navigate back in the directory history.
